jobs.title: Senior AI / ML Engineer
responsibilities: Architect next-generation ML platforms that learn, adapt, and self-optimize across the entire production lifecycle
Design retrieval-augmented and continually fine-tuned LLM pipelines that evolve with real-world feedback loops
Engineer inference systems balancing latency, cost, and accuracy across multi-cloud and edge runtimes
Build evaluation harnesses, synthetic data factories, and red-team frameworks to harden models for enterprise deployment
Pioneer responsible-AI guardrails, bias detection, and explainability layers baked into every release
Drive research-to-production pipelines that turn cutting-edge papers into shipping features within weeks
Lead model lifecycle management — versioning, drift detection, automated retraining, and canary rollouts
Design distributed training infrastructure on GPU/TPU clusters with elastic scheduling and fault tolerance
Mentor engineers, lead architecture reviews, and define the technical north star for the AI organization
Partner with leadership to shape AI strategy, intellectual property, and long-horizon roadmaps

jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
responsibilities: Architect AI-native web experiences where the interface anticipates intent, adapts in real time, and learns from every interaction
Engineer high-performance frontends with streaming, optimistic UI, and sub-second time-to-interactive on global edge networks
Design resilient backend services with event-driven microservices, GraphQL gateways, and serverless compute fabrics
Embed generative UI patterns — copilots, dynamic forms, in-context assistance — into every product surface
Build observability into the stack with distributed tracing, real-user monitoring, and AI-assisted error triage
Champion accessibility, internationalization, and inclusive design so products serve every user, everywhere
Design API contracts, schema evolution strategies, and backwards-compatible versioning across services
Own performance budgets — Core Web Vitals, bundle size, runtime efficiency — and enforce them in CI
Lead technical reviews, raise the engineering bar through testing strategy, and mentor the next generation of engineers
Collaborate with product, design, and AI teams to ship features that feel like magic and run like infrastructure

jobs.title: Senior Mobile Engineer (iOS/Android)
responsibilities: Build mobile experiences powered by on-device intelligence — running quantized LLMs, vision models, and ranking systems locally
Engineer cross-platform architectures that share 80% of code while feeling fully native on each platform
Optimize startup time, battery, memory, and network efficiency to deliver flagship-grade performance
Design offline-first sync engines, conflict resolution, and resilient state machines for unreliable network conditions
Integrate platform AI frameworks — Core ML, ML Kit, Neural Engine — to push intelligence to the device edge
Own the release pipeline: CI/CD, staged rollouts, feature flags, crash analytics, and live observability
Pioneer privacy-preserving techniques like federated learning and on-device personalization
Design native module bridges, custom rendering layers, and platform-specific UX adaptations
Drive app store strategy — review readiness, listing optimization, and rapid iteration on user feedback
Lead mobile architecture, mentor engineers, and shape the long-term mobile platform vision

jobs.title: IoT & Embedded Systems Engineer
responsibilities: Engineer autonomous aerial systems combining embedded intelligence, robotics, and real-time edge computing
Develop flight-control software, navigation pipelines, and mission orchestration systems for UAV platforms
Build secure drone-to-cloud telemetry and command systems with real-time monitoring and fleet visibility
Implement autonomous waypoint navigation, obstacle avoidance, geofencing, and fail-safe recovery systems
Deploy edge AI workloads for computer vision, object detection, landing assistance, and situational awareness
Integrate GPS, IMU, LiDAR, cameras, and sensor-fusion pipelines for stable and intelligent flight behavior
Optimize power, payload capacity, thermal efficiency, and flight endurance for production-ready drone systems
Design resilient communication systems using MAVLink, LTE/5G, mesh networking, and low-latency telemetry protocols
Build simulation and testing environments using AirSim, Gazebo, PX4 SITL, or ArduPilot SITL
Develop remote diagnostics, OTA firmware updates, predictive maintenance, and fleet management capabilities
Collaborate across hardware, AI, cloud, and mechanical engineering teams to deliver fully integrated UAV platforms
Drive end-to-end drone product development — from embedded firmware and PCB integration to deployment and field operations
